name: The Bowery Mission
description: Providing meals, shelter, clothing, and medical care for homeless and hungry New Yorkers.

name: Food Bank For New York City
description: Distributing food and offering nutrition education and counseling to fight hunger across NYC.

name: NYC Well Helpline
description: Free, confidential crisis counseling, mental health referrals, and support via text, call, or chat.

name: St. Vincent de Paul Society - MSC South
description: One of the largest homeless shelters in San Francisco, providing beds, meals, and support services.

name: SF-Marin Food Bank
description: Distributing pantry items and fresh groceries to individuals and families in San Francisco and Marin.

name: San Francisco Suicide Prevention Hotline
description: Providing immediate, confidential crisis intervention and suicide prevention helpline.

name: Pacific Garden Mission
description: Providing shelter, meals, clothing, and spiritual guidance to homeless men and women in Chicago.

name: Greater Chicago Food Depository
description: Chicago's food bank, providing food to over 700 partner agencies, shelters, and pantries across Cook County.
address: 4100 W Ann Lurie Pl, Chicago, IL 60632

name: NAMI Chicago Helpline
description: Confidential support, resource navigation, and guidance for anyone struggling with mental health challenges.
hours: Mon-Fri: 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM, Sat-Sun: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
